Generally not taxable when policy remains in force, but can become taxable if policy lapses/surrenders with gain.
Life policy overfunded under tax rules, causing less favorable taxation of distributions.
Premiums collected are held in fiduciary capacity and must be remitted/handled properly.

explanation: Premiums collected are held in fiduciary capacity and must be remitted/handled properly. Example: Producer collects initial premium and sends to insurer.

prompt: How are life insurance death benefits generally taxed (Drill 2)?

options.text: Maximum time disability benefits are payable.
Definition varies, but generally inability to perform own occupation or any occupation depending on policy.

prompt: Why is LTC inflation protection important?

options.text: Coverage for supervised daytime care outside home for impaired adults.
It helps benefits keep pace with rising care costs.
Severe cognitive impairment can trigger LTC benefits even if physical ADLs are less affected.
LTC or health benefit covering care provided at insured’s home under policy conditions.

explanation: It helps benefits keep pace with rising care costs. Example: 5% compound inflation rider increases daily benefit.

distractorExplanations.c: Only physical disability counts.
distractorExplanations.d: Home care is never covered by LTC.

prompt: How can cognitive impairment trigger LTC benefits (Drill 2)?

options.text: Disabled if unable to perform duties of own occupation, even if able to work elsewhere, depending on policy.
Activities such as bathing, dressing, toileting, transferring, continence, and eating.
Maximum time disability benefits are payable.

explanation: Severe cognitive impairment can trigger LTC benefits even if physical ADLs are less affected. Example: Alzheimer’s disease requiring supervision.
